title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 381.403 - Title insurance companies and agents may enter into construction escrow agreements and issue insured closing letters
text:
381.403.  Title insurance companies and agents may enter into construction escrow agreements and issue insured closing letters. — Licensees may:
  (1)  Enter into construction escrow agreements as part of their services as title insurance companies or title insurance agencies;
  (2)  Issue insured closing letters, if the licensee is a title insurance company.
(L. 1993 S.B. 18 § 381.143 subsec. 2)
